sources.notes: Canonical names, alias decisions, stable identifiers, and prototype placeholder assets are project curation. Miiix may publish and redistribute this material in Miiix products; this proprietary status does not grant third parties an open-data license.

sources.provider: 中华人民共和国国家卫生健康委员会
sources.datasetName: WS/T 464-2015 食物成分数据表达规范
sources.license: Source terms apply; no open-data license asserted
sources.notes: Used as a representation/governance reference, not as a source of numeric nutrient values.

sources.provider: 中华人民共和国国家卫生健康委员会
sources.datasetName: 新冠肺炎疫情防控期间家庭食品安全提示
sources.license: Source terms apply; no open-data license asserted
sources.notes: Used for China-context qualitative storage guidance and the explicitly stated refrigerated shell-egg range.

sources.datasetName: USDA National Nutrient Database for Standard Reference, Release 28
sources.notes: Numeric values are used only for reviewed exact food-form mappings; values are per 100 g.

sources.version: SR Legacy 04/2018; documentation current at retrieval
sources.sourceRevision: SR Legacy 04/2018; documentation current at retrieval
sources.notes: Cataloged as an integration source. No FDC mapping is approved in this seed without a record-level review.

sources.provider: USDA Food Safety and Inspection Service
sources.notes: Used for qualitative fallback storage guidance where the China source does not address the product; day ranges remain null unless record-level evidence is reviewed.

sources.datasetName: Epicure co-occurrence model and vocabulary artifact
sources.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) for the published model and vocabulary artifact
sources.notes: The declared CC BY 4.0 license is recorded only for the published model and vocabulary artifact at revision 03edd31. It is not evidence that the underlying recipe corpus is licensed for copying or redistribution. Miiix uses this source only for ingredient identity alignment and recommendation experiments, with attribution and a separate rights review still required.

importBatches.notes: Offline, curated mapping input pinned to the verified Epicure vocabulary revision. This batch contains token-to-Miiix mapping decisions only; it does not contain or license a recipe corpus.

ingredientForms.description: No physical preparation form is asserted for this catalog record.
The ingredient remains a whole item or a whole retail piece.
The ingredient has been cut into slices without asserting a cooking state.
The ingredient has been cut into small cubes or dice.
The ingredient has been cut or torn into thin strips.
The ingredient has been minced or mechanically ground; its source concept remains explicit.
